title: ebenus depressa
intro: Ebenus depressa, also known as the "Purple Cornflower" or "Ebenus", is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and delicate, depression-like leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ebenus depressa include its ability to soothe coughs and relieve congestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of Ebenus depressa can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and storing them for later use in remedies.
